Disaster Management SystemJun–Aug (2025)
•Built a disaster alert system for real-time incident reporting and emergency coordination.
•Implemented location-based services to display nearby shelters and critical resources.
•Developed using MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js) with REST APIs.
•Optimized performance for handling high user traffic during emergency situations.
DSA Visualizer Sep–Dec (2025)
•Built an interactive DSA Visualizer to demonstrate sorting and searching algorithms with real-time controls and step-
by-step execution.
•Implemented dynamic animations using JavaScript to improve conceptual understanding of algorithm flow and com-
plexity.
•Integrated features like speed control, input customization, and complexity display for enhanced user interaction.
•Designed a responsive and intuitive UI to provide a seamless learning experience across devices.
